thinking.text: The transfer was successful. I should let the customer know that I'm connecting them to a human agent who can better assist them with this promotional offer.

worker_attempts.visible_answer:
I completely understand your frustration, and I apologize for the inconvenience. You're right—the flyer makes it sound like this should be a straightforward process, and I want to make sure you get the help you deserve.

Since I wasn't able to locate this specific promotion in my system, I'm connecting you with a human agent who will have access to additional resources and promotional databases. They'll be better equipped to identify the offer from your flyer and help you sign up for the right card to claim your $1,000 statement credit.

A human agent will be with you shortly. Thank you for your patience!
